description: Set automatic zoning of the sketch set.

6.0.description: Set automatic zoning of the extrusion set.

keywords.name: direction
keywords.description: Control which part(s) of the extrusion are auto-zoned. If not specified, the last value specified is retained (the default is both).

keywords.name: direction-both
keywords.description: Auto-zoning is applied to both the 2D construction data, and the 1D extrude segment data. This is the default.

keywords.name: direction-construction
keywords.description: Auto-zoning is applied to the 2D construction data only.

keywords.name: direction-extrusion
keywords.description: Auto-zoning is applied to the extrude segment data only.

keywords.name: edge
keywords.description: Auto-zoning will attempt to keep the average length of a zone edge to the value f. If not supplied, the previous value will be used. The default value is 1.0.

keywords.name: size
keywords.description: Auto-zoning will assign zone sizes so that there are approximately i zones across the largest model dimension. If not supplied, the previous value will be used. The default value is 100.

keywords.name: total
keywords.description: Auto zoning will assign zone sizes so that the total number of 3D zones created is approximately (but not more than) i.

7.0.description: Set automatic zoning of the extrusion set.

keywords.name: direction
keywords.description: Control which part(s) of the extrusion are auto-zoned. If not specified, the last value specified is retained (the default is both).

keywords.name: direction-both
keywords.description: Auto-zoning is applied to both the 2D construction data, and the 1D extrude segment data. This is the default.

keywords.name: direction-construction
keywords.description: Auto-zoning is applied to the 2D construction data only.

keywords.name: direction-extrusion
keywords.description: Auto-zoning is applied to the extrude segment data only.

keywords.name: edge
keywords.description: Auto-zoning will attempt to keep the average length of a zone edge to the value f. If not supplied, the previous value will be used. The default value is 1.0.

keywords.name: size
keywords.description: Auto-zoning will assign zone sizes so that there are approximately i zones across the largest model dimension. If not supplied, the previous value will be used. The default value is 100.

keywords.name: total
keywords.description: Auto zoning will assign zone sizes so that the total number of 3D zones created is approximately (but not more than) i.

keywords.name: direction-extrusion
keywords.description: Control which part(s) of the extrusion are auto-zoned. If not specified, the last value specified is retained (the default is both ). In FLAC2D automatic zoning is restricted to the construction setting; this keyword is not used. Auto-zoning is applied to both the 2D construction data, and the 1D extrude segment data. This is the default. Auto-zoning is applied to the 2D construction data only. Auto-zoning is applied to the extrude segment data only.

keywords.name: edge
keywords.description: Auto-zoning will attempt to keep the average length of a zone edge to the value f . If not supplied, the previous value will be used. The default value is 1.0.

keywords.name: size
keywords.description: Auto-zoning will assign zone sizes so that there are approximately i zones across the largest model dimension. If not supplied, the previous value will be used. The default value is 100.

keywords.name: total
keywords.description: Auto zoning will assign zone sizes so that the total number of zones created is approximately (but not more than) i .
